nodes.name: Daily 9am Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires every day at 9am before stand-up. Triggers stale ticket detection and velocity report.

parameters.query: SELECT t.ticket_id, t.title, t.status, t.updated_at, s.display_name as squad, s.lead_name FROM kanban_tickets t LEFT JOIN squads s ON t.squad_id = s.id WHERE t.sprint = '1' AND t.status NOT IN ('done') AND t.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days' ORDER BY t.updated_at ASC;

nodes.name: Query Stale Tickets
nodes.notes: Finds Sprint 1 tickets with no update in 2+ days. Feeds Slack alert.

parameters.query: SELECT s.display_name as squad, sv.planned_points, sv.completed_points, sv.tickets_planned, sv.tickets_completed, CASE WHEN sv.planned_points > 0 THEN ROUND((sv.completed_points::numeric / sv.planned_points) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END as velocity_pct FROM sprint_velocity sv JOIN squads s ON sv.squad_id = s.id WHERE sv.sprint = '1' ORDER BY velocity_pct DESC;

nodes.name: Query Sprint Velocity
nodes.notes: Pulls current sprint velocity per squad for daily report.

nodes.name: Format Stale Alert
nodes.notes: Formats stale ticket list into a Slack message.

nodes.name: Format Velocity Report
nodes.notes: Formats velocity metrics into a readable Slack report.

nodes.name: Post Stale Alert to Slack
nodes.notes: Posts stale ticket alerts to #unimart-sprint1 channel.

nodes.name: Log Velocity Snapshot
nodes.notes: Saves velocity snapshot to Supabase for trend tracking.

nodes.name: Webhook: Workshop Findings
nodes.notes: Receives workshop findings POSTed from Figma or manual form. Aggregates into project wiki.

nodes.name: Validate Findings
nodes.notes: Validates workshop findings. Checks for 3+ pain points per acceptance criteria.

parameters.query: UPDATE empathy_maps em SET pain_points = array_append(em.pain_points, $1), updated_at = NOW() FROM user_groups ug WHERE em.user_group_id = ug.id AND ug.name = $2 RETURNING em.id;

nodes.name: Save Findings to Wiki
nodes.notes: Aggregates validated workshop findings into the empathy_maps table (project wiki).

parameters.text:
={{ '📝 Workshop findings received for *' + $json.data.user_group.replace(/_/g, ' ') + '*
• Pain points added: ' + $json.data.pain_points.length + '
• Facilitator: ' + $json.data.facilitator + '
• Received: ' + new Date($json.data.received_at).toLocaleString('en-GB') }}

nodes.name: Webhook: Team Onboarding
nodes.notes: Called when a new team member completes onboarding. Updates DB and notifies squad lead.

nodes.name: Update Onboarding Status
nodes.notes: Updates team member onboarding checklist in Supabase.

nodes.name: Sprint Retro Trigger (Every 2 Weeks)
nodes.notes: Fires on Friday of Sprint end week. Triggers retrospective prep and DoD audit.

parameters.query: SELECT ticket_id, title, status, acceptance_criteria, definition_of_done, pm_signed_off FROM kanban_tickets WHERE sprint = '1' ORDER BY ticket_id;

nodes.name: Query DoD Audit
nodes.notes: Pulls all Sprint 1 tickets for DoD compliance audit before Sprint Review.

nodes.name: Format DoD Report
nodes.notes: Formats the Sprint 1 DoD compliance audit for PM and stakeholders.

nodes.name: Post DoD Report to PM
nodes.notes: Posts DoD audit to #unimart-pm channel for Project Manager review.

_readme.title: UniMart Sprint 1 — n8n Automations
_readme.description: Three automation flows for Sprint 1 EP-01 Discovery & Foundation:

flows.name: Daily Velocity & Stale Ticket Report
flows.purpose: Queries Supabase for stale tickets (no update 2+ days) and sprint velocity per squad. Posts to #unimart-sprint1 Slack before stand-up.
flows.acceptance_criteria: Fulfils US-02 DoD: n8n automated sprint velocity reporting setup

flows.name: Workshop Findings Aggregation
flows.purpose: Receives HCD workshop findings (empathy map entries) from Figma or manual form. Validates 3+ pain points per AC. Saves to Supabase empathy_maps. Notifies #unimart-hcd.
flows.acceptance_criteria: Fulfils US-01: n8n automated aggregation of workshop findings into project wiki

pain_points: Hard to find items across three apps

flows.name: Team Onboarding Tracker
flows.purpose: Called when a team member completes onboarding to a tool. Updates Supabase team_members onboarding flags.
flows.acceptance_criteria: Fulfils US-02: All engineers onboarded to shared Replit workspace (tracked)

flows.name: Sprint Retro DoD Audit
flows.purpose: Pulls all Sprint 1 tickets and checks DoD compliance. Reports incomplete tickets and unsigned-off tickets to PM via Slack.
flows.acceptance_criteria: Fulfils US-02 DoD: Sprint 1 Retrospective completed; action items logged

credentials_required: Supabase Postgres connection (host, port, database, user, password)
Slack OAuth2 (Bot Token with chat:write scope)
setup_steps: 1. Import this JSON into n8n via Settings > Import Workflow
2. Set up Supabase Postgres credentials using your project's connection string
5. Test webhook by POSTing to /workshop-findings with the example payload above
6. Verify Slack messages appear in the correct channels
